instagram_reel.text:
Your AI agent said done. It wasn't. That is the problem /orchestrator is built to catch. Instead of trusting a victory lap, run a sweep, verify the proof, and flag the tickets that only look complete. DM ORCHESTRATOR for the free install guide.

Comment sweep if you want the repo link in replies.

cta.reason_for_now: Get the free install guide before your next agent sweep

hook_variants: Your AI agent said done. It wasn't.
The ticket closed, but the bug was still live.
Done is not done when the proof fails.

tiktok.caption: Your AI said done. It wasn't. /orchestrator runs the sweep, checks the proof, and catches fake completions before they hit production. Comment sweep for the repo.
hook_variants: The problem is not the model.
Smarter agents still fail if nobody verifies the finish.
More autonomy without verification just creates faster mistakes.

youtube_short.title: Your AI Said Done. It Wasn't. /orchestrator Catches It
youtube_short.description:
Your agent can close tickets fast. That does not mean the work is actually done. This reel series shows the /orchestrator verification model: problem, sweep, and verification contract. Repo: https://github.com/maxtechera/orchestrator

CTA: DM ORCHESTRATOR for the install guide or comment sweep for the repo link.
